/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,fawkesconfig.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/lua/fawkesconfig.so CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig_tolua.dir/fawkesconfig_tolua.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesconfig.so -lyaml-cpp /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -L/usr/lib64 -lmagic -ldaemon -ldl -luuid -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -lpthread -lstdc++ /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lsqlite3
